moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins on Thursday at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until Sunday.

angles.name: Main Event Hype
angles.copy: It's almost time for the world's best golfers to descend on Royal Birkdale! The 154th Open Championship gets underway this Thursday. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Southport is about to be the centre of the golf world! The Open Championship kicks off at Royal Birkdale this Thursday. Get ready for an incredible weekend of sport!

moments.title: Wimbledon Crowns Champions
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships concluded yesterday, July 12th, after two weeks of intense tennis action at the All England Club.

angles.name: Post-Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: Another incredible Wimbledon is in the history books! What was your favourite moment from this year's Championships?

angles.name: Champion Shout-out
angles.copy: Huge congratulations to all the champions crowned at Wimbledon 2026! Who truly earned their place in the record books this year?

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted across England, concluded yesterday, July 12th, after a month of thrilling cricket.

angles.name: Tournament Recap
angles.copy: What a tournament it's been! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup finished yesterday, showcasing some incredible talent and nail-biting finishes. Who were your standout players?

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games Approaching
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games are set to begin in Glasgow from July 23rd to August 2nd, with over 3,000 athletes competing across various sports.

angles.name: Countdown Hype
angles.copy: The countdown is on! Glasgow is gearing up to host the Commonwealth Games 2026, kicking off on July 23rd. Get ready for two weeks of world-class sport!

angles.name: Scottish Pride
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready?! The Commonwealth Games are just around the corner, bringing incredible athletes and a fantastic atmosphere to our city from July 23rd!

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, part of the 2026 athletics season, takes place at the London Stadium on July 18th, featuring top track and field athletes.

angles.name: Athletics Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious speed! The London Athletics Meet is hitting the London Stadium this Friday, July 18th, with global stars on track and field. Who are you hoping to see?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival takes place at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi, alongside comedy, theatre and arts.

angles.name: Festival Lineup Hype
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Four days of music, comedy, and arts kick off on July 23rd in Suffolk with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi leading the charge. Who's got their wellies ready?

angles.name: Suffolk Local Angle
angles.copy: Henham Park is about to come alive! Latitude Festival returns July 23-26, bringing huge names and incredible vibes to Suffolk. Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Richard Ashcroft at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Former The Verve frontman Richard Ashcroft performs live at Cardiff Castle on Thursday, July 16th.

angles.name: Welsh Gig Buzz
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is hosting the one and only Richard Ashcroft this Thursday! Get ready for a night of anthems. Who's joining him?

angles.name: Music Lover's Pick
angles.copy: Richard Ashcroft, live at Cardiff Castle this Thursday! Expect iconic tracks from The Verve and his solo career under the stars. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Shangri-La with Sammy Virji at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Shangri-La presents Sammy Virji live at Cardiff Castle on Saturday, July 18th, for a night of electronic music.

angles.name: Dance Night Hype
angles.copy: Sammy Virji is bringing the beats to Cardiff Castle this Saturday for Shangri-La! Get ready to dance the night away under the stars. Who's in?

moments.title: Depot in the Castle: The Wombats & Sugababes
moments.blurb: Depot in the Castle returns to Cardiff Castle on Saturday, July 25th, headlined by The Wombats with special guests Sugababes.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Depot in the Castle is back at Cardiff Castle on July 25th! The Wombats are headlining with pop icons Sugababes as special guests. It's going to be a massive day!

angles.name: Cardiff Big Names
angles.copy: The Wombats AND Sugababes at Cardiff Castle?! Yes please! Depot in the Castle brings huge names to the city on July 25th. Grab your tickets!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Brian May, this Sunday! What's your favourite Brian May riff?

angles.name: Queen's Greatest
angles.copy: He's the man behind some of rock's greatest anthems. Happy Birthday to the incredible Brian May, turning 79 on July 19th! Celebrate with a Queen classic!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated weekly, with the latest chart usually announced on Fridays. Check for new entries and the current number one.

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: Who's battling for the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart this week? We'll find out on Friday! Any predictions for the new Number 1?

angles.name: New Music Focus
angles.copy: Beyond the top 10, what new tracks are making waves on the Official UK Singles Chart? Discover your next favourite song!
